task: I’m in line at a counter when the person working there says I need to wait before I can get the thing I came for. What should I do next so I don’t make the situation harder?

turns.agent_response:
Wait calmly and follow their instruction.  
A good next step is to say something simple like, “Okay, no problem,” and stay in line or move aside if they ask you to. Avoid arguing or pushing for it right away. If they said a specific time or condition, follow that and check back then.

user_simulator.text: Yeah. I’d just say, “okay,” and move back or stand there quiet. If they gave a time, I’d remember it and come back then. No arguing. That just makes it worse.
